summary: NemoClaw is a TypeScript/Node project (an OpenClaw-style agent gateway). Real source lives in src/ (commands, ext, lib, nemoclaw.ts), tests in test/, build via package.json + vitest + biome. It is a large, real codebase.

demoStrategy.note: For a FAST, always-succeeding live demo, the Dev subagent must NOT touch the real complex TS source (build/test would break, slow review). Instead, every feature request is implemented as a small, self-contained file under the dedicated demo-features/ directory, plus an entry in demo-features/README.md. This keeps commits instant, conflict-free, and guaranteed to merge.
demoStrategy.addFile: demo-features/<slug>.(md|js|ts) — a tiny standalone module or spec for the requested feature
demoStrategy.indexFile: demo-features/README.md — append a one-line catalog entry linking the new feature
demoStrategy.reviewConstraint: Same-account PRs cannot be formally APPROVED by bacdemokr; use COMMENT event with verdict in body if a review step is shown.
